raw.subject: Your Greeley page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

You're a family-owned business with a strong military & law enforcement background, which is impressive.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for people in Greeley to find you.

I sketched a page idea from your Facebook that highlights your services, showcases your happy clients, and makes it easy for people to get in touch.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/doggone-awesome-llc-greeley

Would love to discuss how a simple website can help you grow your business. Flat fees for local businesses like yours make it affordable to get online.
